if __name__ == "__main__":
    message = "Dis ya message wey we go pack tight fo send."
    # Pack am tight wit zlib fo save space
    packed = zlib.compress(message.encode("ascii"))
    # Make am safe fo send wit base64
    encoded = base64.b64encode(packed).decode("ascii")
    print("Encoded message:", encoded)
    
    # Now bring am back like new
    decoded_packed = base64.b64decode(encoded)
    unpacked = zlib.decompress(decoded_packed).decode("ascii")
    print("Original message come back:", unpacked)
